name: Iowa Certified Nursing Assistant Certification
description: Already certified as a CNA? Here's whether your certification transfers to Iowa - endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.

provider.name: Iowa Dept of Inspections and Appeals

requiredDocuments.name: Proof of Training
requiredDocuments.description: Certificate of completion from your approved CNA training program.

requiredDocuments.name: State Competency Exam Results
requiredDocuments.description: Official verification of passing your state's nurse aide competency evaluation.

mainEntity.name: How much does Iowa CNA endorsement cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: There is no application fee for CNA endorsement in Iowa. However, background check fees may apply.
No, fingerprints are generally not required for CNA endorsement in Iowa.

mainEntity.name: How long does it take to transfer my CNA certification to Iowa?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most endorsement applications take 2 to 4 Weeks.

mainEntity.name: Can I start working in Iowa while waiting?

acceptedAnswer.text: Check with the state board about temporary practice permits while your endorsement is being processed.
